args.CodeContent:
- [ ] Refactor Header into a full-width classic luxury edge-to-edge navigation bar.
- [ ] Implement Top Level Links: FEMME, HOMME, COFFRETS, MARQUES.
- [ ] Implement Mega Menu for "FEMME" (Columns: Familles, Découverte, Marques; Right: YSL Libre image).
- [ ] Implement Mega Menu for "HOMME" (Columns: Familles, Découverte, Marques; Right: Acqua di Giò image).
- [ ] Implement Mega Menu for "COFFRETS" (Columns: Type de coffrets; Right: Gift box image).
- [ ] Implement Mega Menu for "MARQUES" (Grid of brands with mini images/logos).
- [ ] Ensure mobile menu still works flawlessly with accordion-style dropdowns.
- [ ] Deploy changes to Vercel.
args.Description: Task list for Mega Menu Implementation
